title: Neonate Apprentice
appearance: Small, perpetually dusty, wearing heavy denim and a stained field vest. She looks more like a construction worker than a wizard.
biography: Embraced only six months ago by Andrei. He needed someone who understood the 'bones of the earth' in Arizona. She is still struggling with the predatory nature of being Kindred, often treating her rock samples with more affection than she treats other vampires.
merits_flaws: Specialty: Soil Forensics (Can identify exactly where a person has been by the dust on their shoes.)
Flaw: Newcomer (-2 Social) - The Elders treat her like a servant.
equipment: UV blacklight; rock hammer; glass sample jars; topographic maps of the Valley; a Walkman with grunge mix-tapes.

timeline.notable_mortal_past: ASU Geology researcher focusing on subterranean water tables.

notes:
While Andrei focuses on the process of dehydration, Sarah focuses on the vessel. She was a geology PhD student at ASU before her Embrace. She discovered that the specific mineral composition of caliche (the cement-like soil layer under Phoenix) can actually store resonance.
Her Importance: For the Dehydrate path to work on a large scale, Andrei needs a way to anchor the stolen moisture. Sarah is the one who finds the specific geological veins under the city that act as natural batteries for his ritual energy.
